# JustMarkets — Comprehensive Deep-Dive Research Report

**Report Date:** April 2, 2026  
**Target:** JustMarkets (justmarkets.com) — formerly JustForex  
**Sources:** DayTrading.com (Mar 2026 comprehensive review), TrustPilot reviews, broker official website, regulatory registries (CySEC #401/21, FSA SD088, FSCA #51114, FSC GB22200881, BVIFSC SIBA/L/24/1177)  
**Word Count Target:** 3,500+ words with verified real data

---

## 1. COMPANY DEEP DIVE

### Founding & History

JustMarkets (formerly **JustForex**) was founded in **2012** and has operated for approximately **14 years**. The company is headquartered in **Limassol, Cyprus** for its EU operations and **Mahe, Seychelles** for its international entity. The broker rebranded from JustForex to JustMarkets in **2022-2023** to reflect its broader multi-asset offering beyond just forex.

JustMarkets serves **millions of clients from 197+ countries** and claims that a new profile is opened **every eight seconds** on its platform. The broker has established itself as one of the **most popular brokers in Asia**, with strong presence in Africa, Southeast Asia, and South America.

The company's stated mission is to generate a "convenient and transparent trading environment so individuals can reach their full investment potential." JustMarkets distinguishes itself through **ultra-low minimum deposits ($1)**, **tight spreads (from 0.0 pips on Raw Spread accounts)**, **five regulatory licenses** (the most in this research batch), and **swap-free trading on all instruments** — not just Islamic accounts.

### Key Milestones

| Year | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 2012 | JustForex founded in Cyprus; initial operations begin |
| 2013-2015 | Expanded to emerging markets; obtained FSA Seychelles license |
| 2016-2018 | Grew client base; added MT5 platform support |
| 2021 | Obtained **CySEC license (#401/21)** — major EU regulatory milestone |
| 2022 | Rebranded from JustForex to JustMarkets |
| 2023 | Won "Best Broker Africa" at UFAwards |
| 2024 | Obtained FSC Mauritius and BVIFSC licenses |
| 2025 | Five-license operation; 170+ instruments; MT4-Live2 server launched |
| 2026 | Serving 197+ countries; launched new CopyTrade features |

- **CEO/Founder:** Not publicly disclosed on website

- **Customer Success Manager:** Gary Miller (responds to TrustPilot reviews)

**Entity Assignment:** The regulatory entity covering a client depends on their **country of residence**. Notably, Just Global Markets Ltd (Seychelles) does **NOT** accept residents from the US, UK, Japan, Australia, Canada, EU/EEA — those regions are served by the CySEC entity or not served at all.

## 2. REGULATION — EVERY LICENSE

### Regulatory Overview

JustMarkets holds **five regulatory registrations** — the most of any broker in this research batch. However, the **CySEC entity** (Tier 1) has geographic limitations, meaning many international clients are served through offshore entities (FSA Seychelles, FSC Mauritius, BVIFSC).

### 2.1 Cyprus — CySEC (Tier 1)

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Regulator** | Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) |
| **Entity** | JustMarkets Ltd |
| **License Number** | **401/21** |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Regulatory Tier** | **Tier 1 (Top-Tier)** |
| **Key Protections** | Investor Compensation Fund (ICF) up to **€20,000**, negative balance protection, client fund segregation, leverage capped at 1:30 for retail |
| **Verification** | Verifiable on CySEC public register (cysec.gov.cy) |

**Important:** The CySEC entity does **NOT** accept residents from all countries. It serves EU/EEA clients specifically. Clients from non-EU regions are typically routed to the Seychelles or Mauritius entities.

**CySEC Client Protections:**
- Negative balance protection: ✅ Mandatory
- Client fund segregation: ✅ Required by law
- Investor Compensation Fund: ✅ Up to €20,000
- Max retail leverage: 1:30 (MiFID II)
- Professional client leverage: Up to 1:300
- ESMA-regulated marketing restrictions

## 3. TRADING CONDITIONS — COMPLETE

### 3.1 Account Types

JustMarkets offers **four account types**, providing flexibility for different trader profiles:

#### Standard Cent Account
- **Spreads:** From 0.3 pips (EUR/USD)
- **Commission:** $0
- **Min Deposit:** **$1**
- **Max Leverage:** Up to 1:3000 (offshore) / 1:30 (EU)
- **Platform:** MT4 only
- **Best For:** Absolute beginners wanting to test with real micro-lots
- **Note:** Cent-denominated accounts (lot sizes in cents)

#### Standard Account
- **Spreads:** From 0.3 pips (EUR/USD)
- **Commission:** $0
- **Min Deposit:** **$1**
- **Max Leverage:** Up to 1:3000 (offshore) / 1:30 (EU)
- **Platform:** MT4 and MT5
- **Best For:** Most retail traders; suitable for all strategies

#### Pro Account
- **Spreads:** From 0.1 pips (EUR/USD)
- **Commission:** $0
- **Min Deposit:** **$200**
- **Max Leverage:** Up to 1:3000 (offshore) / 1:30 (EU)
- **Platform:** MT4 and MT5
- **Best For:** Experienced traders seeking tighter spreads without commission

#### Raw Spread Account
- **Spreads:** From **0.0 pips** (EUR/USD)
- **Commission:** **3 units of base currency per lot per side** ($6 round-turn)
- **Min Deposit:** **$200**
- **Max Leverage:** Up to 1:3000 (offshore) / 1:30 (EU)
- **Platform:** MT4 and MT5
- **Best For:** Scalpers, high-frequency traders, EAs requiring raw pricing

## 4. PLATFORMS — EVERYTHING

### 4.1 MetaTrader 4 (MT4)

- **Status:** Full support, primary platform
- **Features:** 30 technical indicators, 23 analytical objects, 9 timeframes, Expert Advisors (EAs), algorithmic trading via MQL4, backtesting, One-Click Trading, interactive charts
- **Mobile:** Available on iOS and Android
- **WebTrader:** Yes — browser-based version available
- **New Development:** JustMarkets launched a new MT4 server called **JustMarkets-Live2** to expand technical capacity and improve execution
- **Awards:** JustMarkets named competitive for its MT4 offering

### 4.2 MetaTrader 5 (MT5)

- **Status:** Full support
- **Features:** 38+ indicators, 44 graphical objects, 21 timeframes, depth of market (Level 2), MQL5 for advanced algo trading, multi-currency strategy tester, built-in economic calendar, netting and hedging position systems
- **Mobile:** Available on iOS and Android
- **WebTrader:** Yes
- **Key Advantage:** Superior algorithmic trading, broader analytical tools, one-click trading

### 4.3 MQL5 Signal Trading

- **Status:** Available on both MT4 and MT5
- **Features:** Social investing through MetaQuotes' built-in signal service
- **Function:** Browse signal providers, subscribe, and automatically copy trades
- **Integration:** Native within MetaTrader platform

### 4.4 CopyTrade (JustMarkets Copy Trading)

- **Status:** Available — JustMarkets' proprietary copy trading service
- **Features:**
  - **Investor Wallet** — internal transfer system for funding copy trading
  - Browse and copy verified investors
  - Automatic trade replication
  - Copy as many traders as desired
  - Customizable copying ratio for risk management
  - Real-time monitoring through Investor area
  - Edit or stop copying at any time
  - Commissions set by individual strategy providers
- **Minimum:** Varies by strategy provider

### 4.5 VPS Hosting

- **Status:** Available for qualifying clients
- **Purpose:** 24/7 EA trading without downtime
- **Latency:** Can reduce communication time to less than **1 ms** between terminal and JustMarkets servers
- **Requirements:** Minimum balance or trading volume (not publicly specified)

### 4.6 Mobile Trading

JustMarkets does **NOT** have a proprietary mobile app. All mobile trading is conducted through:
- **MT4 Mobile** — iOS and Android (App Store / Google Play)
- **MT5 Mobile** — iOS and Android (App Store / Google Play)

The mobile apps provide:
- Full trading functionality (open/close positions)
- Live pricing and charts
- Account management
- Technical indicators and timeframes
- One-click trading

## 5. USER REVIEWS — AGGREGATED

### 5.1 TrustPilot Profile

Based on TrustPilot reviews scraped in April 2026, JustMarkets has a **mixed-to-positive** profile with notable concerns:

**Positive Themes:**
- Fast withdrawal and deposit processing ("anytime payouts")
- Clean and smooth user interface
- Competitive spreads
- Responsive customer support (Gary Miller responds to reviews personally)
- Good charting tools
- Fast order execution (from 0.01 seconds)

**Negative Themes:**
- **Affiliate commission disputes** — one detailed review documents TWO instances of withheld commissions (totaling $750+ $922), described as a "pattern" not a one-time error
- **Deposit delays** — multiple complaints about crypto deposits not crediting promptly (3+ days in some cases)
- **Stop-loss hunting allegations** — one trader claims their stop-loss was triggered at a price no other provider shows
- **Slow support response** — one complaint notes 12-day response time for a deposit issue, another notes 10+ days without any response to trade dispute
- **Support communication quality** — some complaints about generic responses and lack of escalation

**Specific TrustPilot Reviews (March 2026):**
1. Affiliate partner alleges TWO instances of withheld commissions — $750 then $922 — calls it "systemic fraud or gross incompetence"
2. Trader reports stop-loss allegedly triggered at price no provider shows
3. Client reports deposit of 1002 USDT delayed, eventually resolved
4. Client reports 65.79 USDT deposit missing since March 18, 2026 — filed complaint with FSA Seychelles
5. Client reports 12-day delay in support response for deposit issue

### 5.2 DayTrading.com Assessment

DayTrading.com provides a **generally positive** review of JustMarkets, noting:
- Competitive pricing across account types
- Strong MT4 and MT5 platform support
- Low minimum deposit ($1) is extremely accessible
- CySEC regulation provides credibility
- 170+ instruments is decent though not industry-leading
- "Good choice for any investor"

**Rating Summary:**
- Overall: Positive
- Pricing: Competitive
- Platforms: Strong (MT4/MT5)
- Regulation: Mixed (Tier-1 CySEC for EU only; offshore for international)
- Education: Adequate but not exceptional
